channel.title: Active on Serge Bibauw
channel.description: Recent content in Active on Serge Bibauw

item.title: Task-based dialogue systems for language learning
item.description: Doctoral research project at KU Leuven and Université catholique de Louvain. Funded by a SENESCYT scholarship (Ecuador). Researcher: Serge Bibauw. Supervisors: Piet Desmet (KU Leuven) and Thomas François (Université catholique de Louvain)
